summary: Runtime-upgrade-only spec is sufficient for this Loom 0.25.0 workflow maintenance PR. Suite path is not_applicable only because changed paths are limited to workflow/runtime metadata and item-specific carrier evidence.
reviewed_validation_summary: The initial PR updated the workflow pin to 0.25.0 and added the v0.25 repo metadata declaration/spec. Hosted checks consumed v0.25.0 and exposed that fact-chain and semantic review must be item-specific for GH-91; this refresh aligns the current fact-chain and records workflow-only review evidence. Product/runtime tests remain not applicable.

findings.summary: Use a separate Work Item for bootstrap residue, product implementation, or future runtime/provider changes.
